title: Harris Seriously Good NO-LOSS Masonry Paint Brush, 2" (50mm)
features: This seriously good masonry brush gives great results when painting rough and very rough surfaces and has been designed to be used with masonry paints
Our patented No-Loss technology s no bristle loss while you are painting

Use this brush when you want to paint around detailed areas of internal or external brick work render concrete and other rough surfaces with masonry paints For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles Do not wet
This brush is built to last when a decorating job is finished follow cleaning instructions on the paint tin used *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! 2" Harris Seriously Good Masonry Brush What's included? 1 x 2" Harris Masonry Brush Perfect for painting masonry This Seriously Good 2" masonry brush is ideal for painting indoor or outdoor brick walls & is gives a great finish when used with masonry paints. Doing a Masonry Painting SaveProject? Team this brush up with other brushes, rollers & accessories in the Harris Seriously Good range. Harris Painting & Decorating Tools Ranges Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
